item.title: Videos
item.description:
IFR-Medical Robots and SDG Bridging Global Surgical Care Gaps

Defining the Trust Region of the RPLIDAR A2M12

item.title: Backend & Data Practice: Solidifying the Technical Foundation
item.description:
Goal#

Strengthen practical software-engineering ability through Java back-end development, database operations, interface testing, and Python-based data processing.

My Contribution#

As project lead, I planned the technical practice route, implemented back-end service logic, tested interfaces, managed database operations, and used Python for data cleaning and visualisation.

Outcome#

This practice improved my ability to connect back-end engineering with data-oriented workflows, forming a stronger foundation for future robotics and intelligent-system projects.

item.title: ILight Holographic Perception Smart Transportation Project
item.description:
Goal#

Develop a smart transportation solution that uses multi-source sensing, target detection, traffic-flow analysis, and visualisation to improve urban traffic monitoring and management.

My Contribution#

As project lead, I coordinated the overall project direction, organised technical planning, contributed to the perception and visualisation workflow, and prepared project materials for demonstration and evaluation.

Outcome#

The project produced a cloud-edge-end collaborative prototype that demonstrated how intelligent perception can support traffic monitoring, emergency response, and smart-city decision-making.

item.title: Digital Twin-Driven Rolling Bearing Condition Monitoring and Fault Diagnosis System
item.description:
Goal#

Build a digital twin-driven system for rolling bearing condition monitoring, enabling earlier fault identification and more efficient predictive maintenance.

My Contribution#

As project lead, I organised the system design, divided technical tasks, contributed to the fault-diagnosis workflow, and integrated the project narrative around virtual-real interaction and intelligent maintenance.

Outcome#

The final system connected condition-monitoring data, digital-twin modelling, and deep-learning analysis to demonstrate a practical fault-diagnosis pipeline for rotating machinery.

item.title: ILight Smart Transportation Project: Leadership and Implementation
item.description:
Goal#

Explore how an intelligent transportation project can move from technical research to practical implementation, with a focus on solving real urban traffic-management problems.

My Contribution#

As project lead, I was responsible for coordinating the full process, including technical research, project planning, visual demonstration, documentation, and communication between project members.

Outcome#

The work strengthened my experience in leading a technical project from concept to demonstration and showed how perception, data analysis, and system integration can be applied to real smart-transportation scenarios.

item.title: Multi-Functional Smart Street Light Project Based on IoT Perception Network
item.description:
Goal#

Design a multi-functional smart street light system that integrates environmental sensing, traffic monitoring, lighting control, and data visualisation for smart-city scenarios.

My Contribution#

As project lead, I managed the project structure, coordinated functional design, organised sensing and application scenarios, and prepared the technical presentation materials.

Outcome#

The project demonstrated how IoT perception networks can transform traditional street lights into intelligent urban nodes for monitoring, data collection, and city management.

item.title: About
item.description:
Mochi Zhang is a robotics postgraduate student with a background in software engineering, full-stack development, computer vision, and intelligent systems.

This website collects selected projects, technical practice, and video demonstrations.

item.title: CV
item.description:
Experience#

Java Back-end Program Development Trainee & Group Project Leader
2023-12-01 - 2024-01-31
Tianjin Aiying Technology Co., Ltd. (IBM-ETP Training Base) — Technology company focusing on IT training and software development
Tianjin, China

Engaged in Java back-end development and led team project implementation, focusing on system function development and security optimization

  • Used IDE tools to build SpringBoot framework, integrated Mybatis-plus, and implemented basic database CRUD operations
  • Solved Nurse Rostering Problem (NRP) using greedy algorithm and branch-and-bound method, realizing personalized scheduling function
  • Implemented image storage by applying OSS and Redis, and configured related dependencies and service interfaces
  • Combined Sa-token and Redis to achieve dual-token triple authentication, enhancing system security
  • Responsible for team management, task assignment and progress supervision
Software Research & Development Intern
2023-06-01 - 2023-07-31
Hegang Digital Technology Joint-Stock Limited Company — Digital technology enterprise focusing on industrial data management and intelligent detection
Hegang, China

Participated in the development of industrial production data systems and intelligent detection solutions, focusing on efficiency improvement and carbon reduction
